heading: Create a Wildcard Index
body:
You can create [wildcard indexes](manual/core/index-wildcard) to
support queries against unknown or arbitrary fields. To create a
wildcard index in Atlas, manually type the wildcard index
field (`<field>.$**`) into the **Select a field name**
input.

> **Example:** Consider a collection where documents contain a `userMetadata`
> object. The fields within the `userMetadata` object may vary
> between documents.
>
> You can create a wildcard index on `userMetadata` to account for
> all potential fields within the object. Type the following into
> the **Select a field name** input:
>
> ```javascript
> userMetadata.$**
> ```
>
> Specify a type (`ascending` or `descending`) for your wildcard
> index, then click **Create Index**.
>
> Atlas shows the type of your new index as
> **Wildcard**.
